label: Arrival
description: The patient enters the facility (e.g., Emergency Department or specialized Psychiatric Crisis Service).

events.label: Arrival
events.description: Patient arrived at the emergency department

events.label: Disappeared (LWBS)
events.description: Left Without Being Seen (LWBS): Patient registered but walked out during waiting phase.

events.label: Involuntary Detainment
events.description: Involuntary Mental Health Detainment: Patient placed on formal psychiatric hold/section.

events.label: Restrained
events.description: Restraints Applied: Physical, mechanical, or chemical restraints implemented for safety.

events.label: Unrestrained
events.description: Restraints Terminated: Restraints safely discontinued.

events.label: Isolated
events.description: Isolation Initiated: Infection control isolation activated (e.g., Airborne, Droplet, Contact).

events.label: Power of Att.
events.description: Power of Attorney Verified: Legal designation log for substitute decision-maker.

events.label: Security
events.description: Security Intervention: Code White called; security staff actively manage safety threat.

label: Registration
description: Collection of administrative, demographic, and health card details.

events.label: Identification
events.description: Obtain patients basic information

events.label: Anonymous
events.description: Anonymous Registration: Patient arrives unconscious/unidentified; logged under temporary alias.

events.label: Identified
events.description: Identity Merge: Temporary anonymous record reconciled with verified patient identity.

events.label: Information
events.description: Obtain patients secondary information

events.label: Payment
events.description: Obtain patients insurance, payment method

events.label: Bracelet
events.description: Patient issued OCR paper bracelet

label: Triage
description: Assignment of a severity score (e.g., using the Canadian Triage and Acuity Scale) to dictate how quickly the patient needs to be seen.

events.label: Triage Start
events.description: Triage Commencement: Nursing clinical assessment begins.

events.label: Triage Complete
events.description: Triage Completed: Acuity score assigned (e.g., CTAS or ESI level 1-5).

events.label: Triage Re-assessment
events.description: Triage Re-assessment: Waiting room check confirms patient condition deteriorated/improved.

label: Intervention
description: Acute crisis stabilization, medical clearance, and psychiatric evaluations.

events.label: Lab: work ordered
events.description: Laboratory Ordered: Blood, urine, or cultures requested in the system.

events.label: Lab: Blood Drawn
events.description: Phlebotomy Completed: Blood sample drawn from patient and sent to lab.

events.label: Lab: Hemolyzed
events.description: Lab Specimen Hemolyzed: Sample rejected by lab due to degradation; redraw required.

events.label: Lab: Results
events.description: Laboratory Results Released: Data flows back from the lab system into EHR.

events.label: Imaging Ordered
events.description: Imaging Ordered: X-Ray, CT, Ultrasound, or MRI requested.

events.label: Imaging  Started
events.description: Imaging Commenced: Patient arrives at the radiology suite or portable scan starts.

events.label: Imaging Rejected
events.description: Imaging Rejected: Radiology rejects scan request due to instability or technical contraindication.

events.label: Imaging Interpreted
events.description: Imaging Interpretation: Radiologist pushes provisional or final diagnostic report.

events.label: Medication Administered
events.description: Medication Administered: IV fluids, pain relief, antibiotics, or critical drugs given.

events.label: Procedure Performed
events.description: Procedure Performed: Suturing, splinting, intubation, cardioversion, etc.

events.label: Blood Transfusion
events.description: Blood Product Transfusion: Administration of packed red cells, plasma, or platelets.

events.label: OR Transfer
events.description: Transfer to Operating Room: Emergency bypass directly from ED to surgery suite.

label: Holding
description: Holding pending psychiatric evaluations and disposition

events.label: Bed Allocated
events.description: Bed Allocation: Patient moved from waiting room to an active ED treatment bay.

events.label: MD Initial Assessment
events.description: Physician Initial Assessment: First face-to-face evaluation by an ED doctor.

events.label: Vitals
events.description: Vital Signs Recorded: Routine logging of BP, HR, O2 saturation, temperature.

events.label: Clinical NOtes
events.description: Clinical Note Added: Nursing, physician, or allied health progress notes updated.

events.label: Relocation
events.description: Intra-ED Relocation: Patient moved to a different ED zone (e.g., Resus to Fast Track).

label: Disposition
description: The final care outcome, such as direct admission, transfer, or discharge with community referrals.

events.label: Specialist Requested
events.description: Specialist Consultation Requested: ED requests consult from inpatient specialties.

events.label: Specialist Arrived
events.description: Consultant Arrival: Specialist evaluates patient physically in the ED.

events.label: Specialist Decision
events.description: Consultant Decision: Specialist formally recommends admission or discharge.

events.label: Disposition
events.description: Disposition Decision: Attending ED physician signs off on final 'Admit' or 'Discharge' order.

events.label: Certification
events.description: Legal documentation completed by physicians/nurse practitioners under the Mental Health Act for involuntary psychiatric holds or detainment.

events.label: Ward Bed Requested
events.description: Ward Bed Requested: Electronic request sent to central hospital bed booking.

events.label: Ward Bed Allocated
events.description: Ward Bed Allocated: Specific room and bed assigned by central tracking.

events.label: Ward Report
events.description: Nursing Report Given: ED nurse completes clinical handoff to receiving Ward nurse.

events.label: ED Hold
events.description: Patient Boarding: Admitted patient held in ED bed due to lack of open inpatient beds.

events.label: ED Departire
events.description: ED Departure: Patient physically leaves the emergency department footprint.

events.label: IC Transfer
events.description: Intensive Care Transfer: Immediate escalation and transfer to ICU bed.

events.label: Ward Arrival
events.description: Ward Arrival: Patient physically checks into and occupies the inpatient ward bed.

events.label: Discharge Instructions
events.description: Discharge Instructions Given: Prescriptions printed, outpatient follow-ups booked.

events.label: Discharge Clear
events.description: Clinical Discharge: IV lines pulled; patient cleared physically by nursing staff.

events.label: Discharged
events.description: Physical Exit: Patient leaves building under normal circumstances (Self, Family, Taxi).

events.label: Left Against Advice
events.description: Left Against Medical Advice (AMA): Patient signs out or leaves against formal advice.

events.label: Eloped
events.description: Elopement: Patient leaves secretly without notification during active care.

events.label: Discharged Shelter
events.description: Discharge to Shelter: Vulnerable patient discharged to shelter or social services housing.

events.label: Discharge Custody
events.description: External Escort Exit: Patient discharged into custody of police or corrections staff.

events.label: Hospital Transfer
events.description: Inter-Facility Transfer: Patient transferred via ambulance to another hospital site.

events.label: Compassionate Care
events.description: Compassionate Care Transfer: Patient transferred to an off-site hospice facility.

events.label: Patient Deceased
events.description: Patient Deceased: Resuscitation terminated or death pronounced in ED.

events.label: Discharge Coroner
events.description: Coroner Case Release: Deceased body legally transferred to medical examiner.
